text: Fill in the blanks — Second Week of Development
questions: The normal site of implantation is the *posterior/back* wall of the *fundus/body* of the uterus.
The trophoblast differentiates into an inner *cytotrophoblast* and an outer *syncytiotrophoblast:invasive outer layer*.
The implantation window corresponds to Days *20–24/20-24* of the menstrual cycle, when the endometrium is *receptive*.
The bilaminar embryonic disc consists of two layers: the *epiblast* (dorsal) and the *hypoblast* (ventral).
The hormone *hCG/human chorionic gonadotropin* produced by the trophoblast is the basis of pregnancy tests and maintains the *corpus luteum:source of progesterone*.

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
